data.content:
```latex
P(\max_{a} \epsilon_a \leq x) = \prod_{a=1}^{m} P(\epsilon_a \leq x)

= \begin{cases}
0 & \text{if } x \leq -1 \\
\left(\frac{1+x}{2}\right)^m & \text{if } x \in (-1, 1) \\
1 & \text{if } x \geq 1
\end{cases}
```

= \prod_{a=1}^{m} P(\epsilon_a \leq x).
```
